prestazioni: Engine: Volvo/Polestar P90B60T (3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-6, 811Nm stock) – full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and ACL Race Series bearings for 900+ hp reliability on E85.

Turbochargers: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and custom 4-inch V-band downpipes (ceramic-coated) feeding a dual-core PWR intercooler with 1,200cfm airflow capacity.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB LSD in a P1X-specific reinforced aluminum differential housing, paired with a Tilton triple-disc carbon clutch (2,500Nm capacity) and a 3.5:1 final drive ratio from a limited-run Polestar 1 GT homologation gearset.
estetica: Body: Liberty Walk LB-PS6 widebody kit (carbon fiber, bolt-on fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches) featuring a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated active aero flaps (controlled via Polestar’s P*ECO system).

Wheels: HRE FF16 flow-formed forged wheels (20x10.5 ET25 front, 21x12.5 ET15 rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear) and air-jacked via a Vair 444C onboard system.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (quick-release, 380mm diameter), and a custom Motec C127 dash display integrated into the Polestar’s 15-inch infotainment screen.
